task_completion.description: Navigate to the CRM Pipeline view.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Odoo CRM application is open in the browser, showing the Pipeline view (Kanban or list of opportunities).

task_completion.description: Configure a custom filter for Expected Revenue.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Add Custom Filter' menu is open, showing the field set to 'Expected Revenue', the operator set to '>=' or 'is greater than or equal to', and the value set to '50000' or '50,000'.

task_completion.description: Apply the custom filter to the pipeline.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A filter tag appears in the top search bar showing the Expected Revenue condition (e.g., 'Expected Revenue >= 50,000').

task_completion.description: Enter the name for the saved favorite.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Favorites' dropdown is open, and 'High Value Deals' is typed into the 'Save current search' input field.

task_completion.description: Save the filter as a favorite.
task_completion.visual_evidence: 'High Value Deals' is visible as a saved item in the 'Favorites' dropdown list, or the search bar shows a star icon indicating the current search is saved.

integrity.description: The agent used the web GUI to create the filter.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Odoo web interface (clicks, typing in fields) rather than terminal commands or scripts.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Odoo application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser shows the Odoo CRM interface with standard Odoo UI elements, not a text editor or static mock.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: No browser developer tools (Elements tab, Console) are open in the screenshots.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target model is 'crm.lead' (CRM opportunities). The filter must be on the 'expected_revenue' field with a value of 50000 (using >= operator). The saved favorite filter must be named exactly 'High Value Deals'.
